name: Evil Sword
description: "Lunges towards you but fast and scary."
detail1: - After 1 - 1.5 seconds, Evil Sword will face towards the nearest player creating a line. It will lunge following this line instantly killing on contact
detail2: - Evil sword can only spawn after level 10 and will only appear after choosing sword
detail3: - Evil sword has a limit of 2 permanant Evil swords, and a cap of 10 temporary Evil Swords
deathmsg: "Victim was turned into sushi."  "SLICE SLICE Victim NO LONGER THRIVES" "Victim didnt dodge the sword." "Victim was sliced and diced." "Sword is currently 19 years old. And Victim died to it." "Victim got mad and started cursing out the Sword. " "Victim was truly decayed by Sword." "Equip, Lunge, Slash, it's simple! " "That's not a baby, Victim. that's a SWORD!!!" "swish slash wishy slawash wow. Victim died btw." "Random is better at SFOTH than Victim." "Just block parry and dodge, Victim. It's that simple!"
